notes: Crate Digging Edition - Search, filters, metadata enrichment, performance profiles, safe mode, and quality-of-life improvements throughout the player.
NEW Playlist Search - Quickly search the current playlist or your entire library from the Albums and Tracks tabs.
NEW Filters - Filter by artist, year, tags, albums, and lists to find music faster.
NEW Enrich Lists - Upgrade older playlists and queues with searchable metadata. New additions are enriched automatically.
NEW Performance Profiles - Choose between Battery Saver, Balanced, and Full Quality modes.
NEW Safe Mode - Launch with reduced compatibility settings if the app has trouble starting.
Improved Jump List - Added search, drag-and-drop reordering, and a full context menu.
Smarter Restarts - The app can now restart itself after applying settings that require it.
Faster Navigation - Quicker fan menu updates, faster Nano startup, smoother Image Viewer entry, and instant Undo/Redo.
Smoother Experience - Improved startup/shutdown flow, cleaner URL transitions, and more seamless login/logout handling.
Better Reliability - Stronger login persistence, improved metadata handling, and numerous bug fixes.
Thanks - Special thanks to alabx and yetzdfmniaak for testing, feedback, and issue reporting.
